## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## How to test

Steps to validate the change locally.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pnpm lint`
- [ ] I ran `pnpm type-check`
- [ ] I ran `pnpm test` (or explained why not)
- [ ] I added/updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I updated documentation where appropriate

## Related issues

Link issues, if any.
